descriptionText: NEW Galeon 410 HTC for Sale 2024 - AVAILABLE IMMEDIATELY- READY TO SAIL NOW- FULLY EQUIPPED: The Galeon 410 HTC for sale 2024 is an opportunity for anyone looking to own a luxury motor yacht in excellent condition. This brand new vessel has never been used and is fully equipped with a comprehensive range of features, ensuring a sophisticated and comfortable experience on the water.Specifications:Model: Galeon 410 HTCMotorisation:2 x Volvo Penta D4-300 DPIInterior Features:Walnut matt dark finishArtificial leather upholstery in the salon "Eco Leather"Wooden floor in the saloon and kitchenBlack pleats in the salonAmbient lighting (kitchen, salon, and cabins)Roman blinds in the cabinsCurtain at the cabin entrance doorFly screenExterior Features:Hydraulically bathing platform that can be loweredPermateak on bathing platformSun lounger on the foredeckWindshield cover in beige colourManual sun protection (shell) in beigeTechnical Equipment:Bow thruster with joystickStern thruster with joystickInterface NMEA 2000Raymarine chart plotter 1 x Axiom 12 RV-EU + Transducer B60Inverter 230 V/3 kW with an additional batteryW-LAN Antenna220 V shore power connection in the anchor lockerDeck washing system in both bow and stern areasAutopilot/TV-Dom: Satellite TV AntennaComfort Features:TV-32” LED flat screen in the salon, retractableAir conditioning 32,000 BTUGenerator 9000 PaguroSockets: 9 x 220 V and USB socketsThe spacious layout includes a sophisticated salon featuring a retractable flat-screen TV, a well-appointed kitchen, and inviting cabins designed for restful nights and relaxed mornings. descriptionHtml:
NEW Galeon 410 HTC for Sale 2024 - AVAILABLE IMMEDIATELY- READY TO SAIL NOW- FULLY EQUIPPED: 

The Galeon 410 HTC for sale 2024 is an opportunity for anyone looking to own a luxury motor yacht in excellent condition. This brand new vessel has never been used and is fully equipped with a comprehensive range of features, ensuring a sophisticated and comfortable experience on the water.

Specifications:

  • Model: Galeon 410 HTC
  • Motorisation:
    • 2 x Volvo Penta D4-300 DPI
  • Interior Features:
    • Walnut matt dark finish
    • Artificial leather upholstery in the salon "Eco Leather"
    • Wooden floor in the saloon and kitchen
    • Black pleats in the salon
    • Ambient lighting (kitchen, salon, and cabins)
    • Roman blinds in the cabins
    • Curtain at the cabin entrance door
    • Fly screen
  • Exterior Features:
    • Hydraulically bathing platform that can be lowered
    • Permateak on bathing platform
    • Sun lounger on the foredeck
    • Windshield cover in beige colour
    • Manual sun protection (shell) in beige
  • Technical Equipment:
    • Bow thruster with joystick
    • Stern thruster with joystick
    • Interface NMEA 2000
    • Raymarine chart plotter 1 x Axiom 12 RV-EU + Transducer B60
    • Inverter 230 V/3 kW with an additional battery
    • W-LAN Antenna
    • 220 V shore power connection in the anchor locker
    • Deck washing system in both bow and stern areas
    • Autopilot/TV-Dom: Satellite TV Antenna
  • Comfort Features:
    • TV-32” LED flat screen in the salon, retractable
    • Air conditioning 32,000 BTU
    • Generator 9000 Paguro
    • Sockets: 9 x 220 V and USB sockets

The spacious layout includes a sophisticated salon featuring a retractable flat-screen TV, a well-appointed kitchen, and inviting cabins designed for restful nights and relaxed mornings. Added conveniences like ambient lighting and robust interior finishes enhance the onboard atmosphere.

The yacht is also designed for ease of use, with features like joystick controls for both the bow and stern thrusters, making manoeuvring a straightforward task, even for those new to boating. The hydraulic bathing platform adds to the enjoyment of water activities, offering easy access to the sea.

The Galeon 410 HTC for sale 2024 comes with a suite of modern technologies to enhance your sailing experience. From the advanced charter plotter to the air conditioning system, your comfort and safety will always be a priority.

In summary, if you are in the market for a brand-new yacht that is fully equipped and ready for launch, the Galeon 410 HTC for sale 2024 offers an excellent opportunity. Delivered in September 2024 she is set for her launch date at the end of February 2025, she is a vessel that promises quality and enjoyment for years to come. Don’t miss your chance to make this stunning yacht your very own.
